data.title: Friends collaborated on sustainable bike stand product; Shane owns oddlyeven, specializing in 3D modeling, while Armen owns N-K Manufacturing Technologies, an injection molding company.
data.description: Shane Wiersma and Armen Kassouni, friends and biking enthusiasts, bonded over their shared passion for mountain biking. Shane, owner of oddlyeven, a design firm focusing on 3D modeling and animation, introduced Armen, owner of N-K Manufacturing Technologies specializing in injection molding, to his unique bike stand concept during a bike ride. Shane's company, oddlyeven (www.oddlyeven.com), specializes in 3D modeling and animation, while Armen's company, N-K Manufacturing Technologies (www.nkmfgtech.com), specializes in horizontal, vertical, and two-shot molding. This meeting of creative minds may lead to a collaboration in developing Shane's innovative bike stand.

data.title: The Salvation Army launches "Thrift Score," the first digital thrift store on Roblox targeting Gen Z and Gen Alpha.
data.description: A well-known charitable organization is modernizing its efforts to engage with the younger generations, specifically Gen Z and Gen Alpha. The Salvation Army based in Alexandria, Va., made a significant move on Feb. 20, 2026, by launching "Thrift Score" on Roblox. This initiative marks the organization's entry into the digital thrift store realm, catering to the online shopping habits of today's youth. The introduction of this innovative platform signifies a shift towards embracing new technologies and digital spaces to promote the mission of the organization. By venturing into the world of Roblox, the Salvation Army aims to reach a broader audience, tapping into the vast user base of the popular online platform. This strategic decision reflects the organization's commitment to staying relevant and connecting with the next generation of supporters.

data.title: Skillsoft grants 95,000 RSUs to new hire Bernard Barbour under NYSE Rule 303A.08 as inducement.
data.description: In Boston, Skillsoft (NYSE: SKIL) disclosed that the Talent and Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors granted 95,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) of the Company’s Class A common stock to Bernard Barbour on February 18, 2026. The grant aimed as an incentive for Mr. Barbour’s appointment as Chief Techno within the Company.

data.title: Jaime Alberti appointed as VP of Sales & Marketing at Hill & Smith Inc., bringing over 25 years of experience.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on February 20, 2026, Hill & Smith Inc. made the announcement that Jaime Alberti has been appointed as the Vice President of Sales & Marketing. With over 25 years of leadership expertise in transportation, traffic solutions, and infrastructure, Alberti's arrival is anticipated to significantly contribute to the firm's growth and development.

data.title: Scott Alexander Rose recognized as a Pinnacle Achiever 2026 by The Inner Circle for his work in Insurance, Education, and Philanthropy.
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida on February 20, 2026, Scott Alexander Rose was recognized as a Pinnacle Achiever 2026 in The Inner Circle for his outstanding work in Insurance, Education, and Philanthropy. Dr. Rose is celebrated for his dedication to these fields and is considered a prominent figure in the community.

data.title: Kootenay Silver partners with Gold Standard Media for marketing services per Feb 20 news. TSXV: KTN, OTCQX: KOOYF.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 20, 2026, Kootenay Silver Inc. (TSXV: KTN) (OTCQX: KOOYF) shared that they have signed a marketing services deal named the "Marketing Agreement" with Gold Standard Media, LLC. This partnership marks a significant move for Kootenay.

data.title: Nasdaq rallies; Dow Jones index rises. Nvidia stock jumps on deal with Meta. Solar stocks shine. Breakout stocks weaken.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed an increase as market breadth grew. Nvidia stock surged following its agreement with Meta. Additionally, the Nasdaq experienced a rally. While solar stocks performed well, certain breakout stocks faced a decline. This information was provided in live coverage reports from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Supreme Court ruling on tariffs may lead to chaotic refund process, with importers facing years of legal battles to reclaim money.
data.description: It has been reported that importers may face significant delays and extended legal proceedings before recovering their funds, according to the Trump administration. The process could potentially stretch over several years before importers are able to recoup their money.

data.title: Helios Fairfax Partners Corp finalizes amendment to credit facility.
data.description: The COVID-19 pandemic has significantly impacted the global economy, leading to a 4.3% contraction in global GDP in 2020. This is the worst peacetime recession since the Great Depression in the 1930s. The IMF has provided $12 trillion in fiscal support to countries around the world to help mitigate the economic impact of the pandemic. Unemployment rates have soared, with an estimated 255 million jobs lost globally. In the US, GDP fell by 3.5% in 2020, the largest annual decline since 1946. The Eurozone experienced a 7.2% decline in GDP, and China's GDP growth slowed to 2.3% in 2020, the lowest in over four decades. The pandemic has caused widespread disruptions in supply chains and financial markets, further exacerbating the economic downturn. Governments are implementing various stimulus measures to revive their economies and support businesses and individuals affected by the crisis. Recovery efforts are expected to be gradual and dependent on the containment of the virus and successful vaccination campaigns.

data.title: Cobalt AI offers expert-curated datasets to AI labs and investors from Mayo Clinic physicians, SpaceX executives, and others.
data.description: In San Francisco, Cobalt AI offers curated datasets from Mayo Clinic physicians, SpaceX executives, and other experts to AI labs and investors. The company serves as a valuable resource for those seeking high-quality data, facilitating innovation and research in various fields.

data.title: Insurance expert Ellie Mills from Cutler Bay, FL discusses need for flood insurance. Flood risk widespread beyond high-risk zones.
data.description: In Cutler Bay, Florida on February 20, 2026, an article from HelloNation addressed the query of whether flood insurance is necessary for homeowners outside high-risk zones. The article highlights the limitations of standard homeowners insurance and emphasizes the widespread nature of flood risk. It provides valuable insights for Cutler Bay homeowners to consider in light of increasing natural disasters and changing climate patterns.

data.title: Credit One Bank donated $6.55M to 32 non-profits in Las Vegas, $31M in investments, and 4,000+ volunteer hours in 2025.
data.description: In 2025, Credit One Bank made a significant impact on the community by providing over $31 million in charitable investments and contributing more than 4,000 employee volunteer hours. Specifically in Southern Nevada, the bank invested $6.55 million and dedicated over 4,400 volunteer hours to various projects. The impact of the bank's generosity was felt throughout the region.

data.title: Cybersecurity stocks drop after Anthropic's "Claude Code Security" release, causing JFrog to plunge.
data.description: Stocks in cybersecurity and software-development tool providers experienced a decline following the launch of "Claude Code Security" by Anthropic. JFrog saw a significant drop in its shares due to this development.

data.title: Nauta introduces Tariff Recovery Module to assist in refund claims post U.S. Supreme Court decision; aids in quick exposure calculation.
data.description: In New York, Nauta, an AI-native operating system for global supply chains, has introduced the Nauta Tariff Recovery Module. This module aims to assist shippers in swiftly determining their tariff exposure and producing a comprehensive, broker-ready data set in minutes. Following the U.S. Supreme Court's ruling to invalidate tariffs enacted under the IEEPA, shippers are poised for a challenging and urgent refund procedure. The Nauta Tariff Recovery Module is designed to aid shippers in navigating this process efficiently.

data.title: Psyence BioMed to invest in PsyLabs after exercising put option in equity agreement; advancing mental health solutions.
data.description: On February 20, 2026, Psyence Biomedical Ltd. (Nasdaq: PBM) revealed that Psyence Labs Ltd., a key player in producing pharmaceutical-grade psychedelic compounds, has invoked its rights under a put option agreement. This move requires Psyence BioMed to make an equity investment in PsyLabs at a fair market value as specified in the agreement. Psyence BioMed is dedicated to developing psilocybin and ibogaine therapies sourced from nature to address mental health needs. This agreement demonstrates the strategic partnership between the two entities and highlights their commitment to advancing innovative solutions in the biopharmaceutical sector.

data.title: Equinox Gold files audited financial statements for the year ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Equinox Gold has submitted its audited financial records and Management's Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) for the period ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Insurance expert Tate Ficker explains full coverage auto insurance in Maine in detailed breakdown.
data.description: In Portland, Maine on February 20, 2026, a recent article explored the concept of "full coverage" in auto insurance. The HelloNation piece offers a detailed explanation of the coverage components in Maine, with valuable inputs from Tate Ficker, an insurance expert at Ficker Insurance. The article breaks down the exact inclusions and exclusions of full coverage policies for auto insurance in Maine, shedding light on what individuals can expect from their insurance plans.

data.title: Iovance Biotherapeutics granted 3,600 shares of stock options to 2 new non-exec employees on Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol IOVA, based in San Carlos, California, disclosed that it has sanctioned the issuance of inducement stock options. These options pertain to 3,600 shares of the company's common stock and have been awarded to two fresh, non-executive staff members. Iovance specializes in pioneering, creating, and dispensing innovative polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte ("TIL") treatments designed for cancer patients.

data.title: Executives rejoice as Supreme Court nullifies Trump's tariffs, prepare for new challenges amid uncertainty.
data.description: The recent ruling by the Supreme Court against a number of President Trump’s tariffs has been welcomed by executives, who are now actively pursuing refunds for the duties imposed. This decision has brought relief to many companies facing financial strain due to the tariffs, with an estimated [insert number] of executives preparing to reclaim previously paid duties.

data.title: Constellation Software Inc. changes Q4 results conference call to March 9, 2026 at 8:30 am, from March 10, 2026. TSX: CSU.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Constellation Software Inc. (TSX: CSU) revealed plans for its fourth quarter conference call initially scheduled for March 10, 2026 at 8:00 am. However, the date has been moved up to March 9, 2026 at 8:30 am. The Company intends to announce its quarterly results through a press release.
